basics.name: Jeo Jeon (전제오)
basics.label: Undergraduate Researcher in AI
basics.summary: Third-year undergraduate student in Computer Science at Gachon University, expected to graduate in February 2028. Interested in affective computing, multimodal AI, human-centered AI, and machine learning research.

work.summary: Participating in paper reading sessions and deep learning study as an undergraduate researcher.
highlights: Building research foundations in pattern recognition, machine learning, and deep learning
Research projects and proposal-related work will be added when available

work.company: Aing, AI Academic Club at Gachon University
work.summary: Operating the AI academic club and supporting member learning.
highlights: Planning and facilitating study sessions and activities

work.company: Aing, AI Academic Club at Gachon University
work.summary: Designed and led a structured study program on Transformer architecture and the Attention mechanism.
highlights: Connected Attention Is All You Need to implementation practice through paper-to-code mapping and PyTorch notebooks

portfolio.name: LG Aimers 8th Model Compression
portfolio.description: Team-led LLM compression project for EXAONE-4.0-1.2B. Ranked Top 40 out of 600+ teams; public repository reports 40th place, score 0.63166, and 69 submissions. Strategy focused on QLoRA-based SFT, sequence-length trade-off analysis, and optional GPTQ W8A8 quantization.

portfolio.name: Transformer Architecture Study
portfolio.description: Junior-track Transformer study curriculum connecting Attention Is All You Need to paper-to-code mapping, from-scratch PyTorch implementation, and translation fine-tuning experiments.
